scope: Discovery + signal coverage audit of HF datasets for closing telemetry gaps in Aurelius forecasting engines. Not a forecaster fit, not a scheduler change, not a pilot-equivalence claim.

search_summary.search_quality_status: plateaued — round 3 hits dominated by term-match false positives (cable routing, customer support routing, code reasoning traces) with no new telemetry-relevant candidates

datasets.notes: Already ingested + audited per docs/HF_CARA_SWISSAI_TELEMETRY_AUDIT.md. CloudLab research cluster, 18 model instances × 4 GPU types. 9× p99 latency spread on Qwen2.5-3B across GPU types.
Already ingested. Production traffic shape + bucket-reuse cache residency signal. License 'other' — redistribution requires ToS check.
9 models × 14 GPU configs × 2 serving engines (vLLM 0.19.0, SGLang 0.5.9); 3197 main sweep rows + 148077 per-kernel NCU profiles. Heterogeneous-placement-prior gold.

Real ChatGPT/GPT-4 workload trace from Microsoft Azure with per-request timestamps, model, prompt/response tokens, and Log Type (Conversation vs API). Includes 'with_fails' splits for retry/failure analysis. Largest pure-arrival dataset in HF for production LLM traffic.

949 multi-turn agentic Claude Code production traces, 136.1k requests, per-request KV block hashes. Replayable against vLLM/SGLang. Best HF dataset for agentic prefix-residency forecasting + migration veto evaluation.

787 multi-turn agentic LLM sessions, 24,881 iterations, ≥5 turns/session, ≥10K context tokens. Built for benchmarking tiered KV cache solutions (LMCache). Direct fit for cache-residency forecast evaluation.

Largest public cluster trace (Google Borg 2019). Contains collection_events + instance_events with task lifecycle: SUBMIT, SCHEDULE, EVICT, FAIL, FINISH, KILL, LOST, UPDATE_PENDING, UPDATE_RUNNING. Provides autoscaling/migration/placement labels that no LLM-serving trace has. 117 GB — partial ingest only.
BurstGPT subset enriched with LMSYS-Chat prompt text for 2 days. Useful if prompt content needed for prefix-residency simulation alongside arrival timing.

Deterministic prompt sets for benchmarking KV prefix caching: shared_schema_1k, multiturn_agent_branching, same_document_multi_query_8k, eviction_pressure_4k. Designed for vLLM/SGLang cache benchmarks.
Workload corpus for HF's inference-benchmarker tool: classification, github_code, share_gpt (turns/0-turns/filtered), summarization. Drives realistic synthetic load against a serving fleet.
Four prompt profiles (A/B/C/D) sourced from Odyn Network distributed inference platform (vLLM + Ray Serve + FastAPI). Useful as a workload profile for replay benchmarks.

80+ datasets covering (model × GPU SKU × kernel) latency profiles: H100/H200/A100/A40/L40 with NVLink/PCIe topologies, for Llama-2/3, Qwen, CodeLlama, Phi-2, InternLM, Gemma. Each dataset is small (~40KB-37MB). Treat as a heterogeneous-latency-prior database.

DGX Spark GB10 (Grace Blackwell, 128GB unified memory) KV cache quantization benchmark. Has rss_gb (GPU/unified memory used). Tiny dataset but rare hardware coverage. Same content as Nathan-Maine/dgx-spark-kv-cache-benchmark.
Small CSV with TTFT/Latency/TPS across libraries (vLLM, TGI, etc.) and models. Useful as cross-library priors only.
Synthetic ~50-row LLM-classification benchmark for power-load coherence risk. Not a measurement dataset; useful only as test prompts for power-failure narrative classifiers.
Synthetic ~50-row thermal coherence eval. Useful for shape priors only; not for thermal forecasting fit.
Synthetic cooling-water-demand eval. Curtailment + permit-discharge signals are interesting for region placement, but tier-6 synthetic prevents training fit.
Synthetic SLO-breach + preemption + queue-depth eval. The only HF dataset with explicit slo_breach_rate + preemption fields, but synthetic origin prevents training fit.
Synthetic node-failure cascade eval. Synthetic origin prevents training fit.
186 GB OpenFOAM hot-aisle CFD simulations for thermal modelling. Useful only for offline pre-training of a thermal surrogate; does not provide live thermal telemetry.
Synthetic production-style multi-table LLMOps telemetry: cost, latency, tokens, failures, safety flags, tool usage, user feedback. SFT-oriented — synthetic origin prevents forecaster fit.
TCQ KV cache codebooks + paper PDF. Not a telemetry dataset; useful only if Aurelius explores quantized-KV residency.
vLLM leaderboard JSON with per-submission summary metrics. Mostly leaderboard-format JSON; not per-request granularity.
Ten verified seeds for evaluating KV-cache reuse accuracy under shifting warmup conditions. License (cc-by-nc-nd-4.0) blocks derivative redistribution.
Duplicate of BurstGPT_LMSYSChat_withPrompt_2Days re-packaged as tar/zip/zst archives. Not preferred over the parquet form.
100-row AI-generated SMOLTRACE eval format for cloud-cost task evaluation. Synthetic + tiny — eval-only.
Prompt → task-category classification dataset. Term-match for 'routing' but NOT serving routing — content routing only.
Tiny GPT-4o-vs-GPT-3.5 prompt routing classifier. Not serving routing.
Domain-specific LLM-selection (smart routing) dataset. Not serving fleet routing.
Prompt-content routing classifier. Not serving fleet routing.
Tiny demo leaderboard. Useful as a 'shape of expected leaderboard JSON' but no telemetry.
Distilabel pipeline output, not serving telemetry. Term-match only.
GPT-Researcher domain-browsing traces; not serving telemetry.
Humanoid-robot cognitive load balancing eval. Term-match only — unrelated.

partially_covered_after_proposed_ingest.autoscaling_events: Google Cluster 2019 (job-level Borg events, not GPU/replica)
partially_covered_after_proposed_ingest.customer_traffic_mix: BurstGPT (Conversation vs API Log Type) + CC-traces (Claude Code segmentation)

newly_strongly_covered_after_proposed_in.arrival_patterns: BurstGPT + CC-traces + LMCache agentic + Google Cluster 2019
newly_strongly_covered_after_proposed_in.prefix_reuse: CC-traces (KV block hashes) + LMCache agentic + SwissAI (already)

recommended_ingest_order.rationale: Largest pure-arrival production trace (Microsoft Azure). Unlocks STRONG arrival_forecast + capacity_forecast + autoscaling. 4 CSVs, 390 MB — full ingest feasible.
Real Claude Code production traffic with per-request KV block hashes. Unlocks STRONG cache_residency + migration_forecast evaluation. 2.8 GB single file — bounded ingest (50-100 MiB).
787 curated multi-turn agentic sessions with prefix growth ≥10K context. Complements CC-traces for cache_residency evaluation. 2.3 GB parquet — bounded ingest.

Only public cluster trace with measured collection / instance lifecycle events (SUBMIT, SCHEDULE, EVICT, FAIL, FINISH, KILL). Gives autoscaling + migration + capacity labels nothing else has. 117 GB — bounded sample only (e.g. 1 instance_events shard).
Adds eviction_pressure + multiturn_agent_branching prompt patterns for replay-driven cache-residency evaluation. 79 MB — full ingest feasible.
Prompt-enriched 2-day BurstGPT subset. Enables joint arrival + prefix-replay studies. 7 MB — full ingest.
HF's official benchmarker workload corpus. Useful as a third-party replay source for cross-validation. 466 MB — bounded ingest of 1 split.
vLLM + Ray Serve prompt profiles. Cross-stack workload prior. 8 MB — full ingest.
Per-(GPU SKU × model × kernel) latency profiles. Ingest H100/A100/H200 base profiles for heterogeneous-placement priors. ~50 MB total for the chosen subset.
Rare DGX Spark GB10 unified-memory KV cache benchmark with rss_gb signal. Tiny (~13 KB). Adds a unique GPU SKU.

exact_signals_still_requiring_real_custo: autoscaler event log (scale-up/scale-down events + decision rationale)
DCGM GPU_memory_utilization (per-process VRAM used) time series
DCGM thermal sensor time series (T_core, T_HBM)
DCGM power_draw time series (W per GPU)
model_load_event (load start + load complete + bytes from disk/network)
cold_start_latency (model load start → first inference ready)
prewarm_event (model preloaded but not yet serving)
cross_region routing decision (request → region/zone chosen + alternatives weighed)
customer / tenant traffic_mix labels (per-tenant SLA tier)

estimated_forecast_coverage_after_propos.cache_residency: STRONG (SwissAI already + CC-traces + LMCache agentic + PrefixBench)
estimated_forecast_coverage_after_propos.cold_start: WEAK (proxies only; pilot required for real labels)
estimated_forecast_coverage_after_propos.autoscaling: MODERATE (BurstGPT + Google Cluster 2019; Borg events are job-level, not GPU-replica; loop missing)
estimated_forecast_coverage_after_propos.arrival_forecast: STRONG (BurstGPT + CC-traces + LMCache agentic + Google Cluster 2019)
estimated_forecast_coverage_after_propos.thermal_forecast: WEAK (only PhysicsNeMo CFD simulation; pilot DCGM required)
estimated_forecast_coverage_after_propos.cost_forecast: WEAK (synthetic-only on HF; pilot billing required)
estimated_forecast_coverage_after_propos.migration_forecast: MODERATE (CC-traces KV hashes + Google Cluster 2019 evict events)

rejected_term_matches_pruned: ClarusC64/* — synthetic LLM evals, not measurement data
lerobot/berkeley_cable_routing* — robotics cable routing, not serving routing
mrzaizai2k/gpt_routing, kdqemre/smart_routing_v1, a5ilank/cross-prompt-routing — model-selection routing, not fleet routing
kubernetes-bad/* — username term-match, not Kubernetes data
philly_restaurants/philly_reviews — city of Philadelphia, not Philly cluster trace
